overall.description: First-person walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring rain-slicked streets illuminated by neon signs and holographic advertisements. The camera moves steadily through futuristic urban canyons with towering glass skyscrapers, passing from a construction-barrier-lined sidewalk through an intersection and into a dense commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with yellow construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to yellow construction barriers, passing under street lights

entered.detail: concrete barriers with yellow paint and graffiti running along the left side of the walkway
tall dark building with illuminated 'NIGHT CITY' signage on the facade
tall pole with horizontal LED light fixture casting white light downward
high-rise building with numerous illuminated apartment windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow futuristic city street at night, with the camera walking forward along a wet concrete sidewalk. Yellow construction barriers line the left side while towering dark glass buildings rise on both sides. A prominent 'NIGHT CITY' sign is visible on the right building, and street lights with long horizontal fixtures illuminate the path ahead.

events.description: approaching crosswalk at intersection with traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past large concrete planters with palm trees, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: standing at the crosswalk waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: large concrete planters containing palm trees with uplighting
yellow and white striped crosswalk markings visible ahead on the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a slightly wider street lined with palm trees in concrete planters on the left. The camera continues walking forward as the environment opens up toward a large intersection. A pedestrian waits at the crosswalk ahead, and an elevated highway structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk and onto the crosswalk to cross the wide street
passing underneath the massive elevated highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection beneath the elevated highway, moving from one side to the other

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the intersection overhead
modern building with vertical strips of illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide asphalt intersection, moving beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The spatial layout opens up significantly, revealing the underside of the highway structure and modern buildings with vertical lighting strips. The crosswalk markings pass beneath the camera as it moves steadily across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with overhead holographic advertisements

events.description: entering area with dense overhead holographic billboards and intense neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit commercial district with dense holographic advertisements overhead

entered.detail: dense array of floating holographic advertisements and digital screens spanning overhead
cylindrical building wrapped with horizontal neon rings in multiple colors
building facade covered with large digital screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dense commercial corridor characterized by overwhelming neon signage and holographic billboards floating overhead. A distinctive cylindrical building with colorful horizontal neon rings dominates the left side, while the right side features building facades entirely covered in digital screens. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera moves through this heavily advertised urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked urban landscape that evolves from a narrow construction zone into a dazzling, neon-saturated commercial district. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk flanked by yellow construction barriers and towering dark glass buildings, passing a prominent Night City sign under the glow of horizontal street lights. As the path widens, the camera moves past palm trees in concrete planters toward a large intersection, where the view expands to reveal a distant elevated highway. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the wide asphalt intersection and passes beneath the massive concrete overpass, moving through an open space defined by modern buildings with vertical lighting strips. Finally, the environment closes in again as the camera enters a dense commercial corridor dominated by floating holographic billboards and a cylindrical building wrapped in colorful neon rings.
